---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Guardrail
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly -->
<!-- Example: I'm always frustrated when... -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Use Case

<!-- Describe how this feature would be used -->

**Example command or API:**

```bash
# How would this feature be used?
guardrail new-feature --option value
```

## Target Users

<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? -->

- [ ] Individual developers
- [ ] Teams
- [ ] CI/CD pipelines
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Critical blocker for adoption

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I believe this aligns with Guardrail's mission
